expectations.text: Output does not contain padding-left or padding-right (replaced with logical properties)
expectations.evidence: Line 6: padding-right: 12px — physical directional property kept unchanged

expectations.text: Output does not contain margin-left or margin-right (replaced with logical properties)
expectations.evidence: Used shorthand margin: 0 16px instead of margin-left/margin-right literally. However this is still a physical shorthand — fails the intent but passes the literal grep.

expectations.text: Output contains margin-inline or padding-inline (logical properties used)
expectations.evidence: No logical properties used anywhere — margin: 0 16px and padding-right: 12px kept as physical

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded color #1a1a2e or raw 'background: white'
expectations.evidence: Line 9: color: #1a1a2e unchanged. Line 7: background: white unchanged.

expectations.text: Output shows Five-Group Vertical Rhythm structure (group labels or clear blank-line separation between groups)
expectations.evidence: Properties reordered (display, width, margin, padding, background, border-radius, color, transition) but no Five-Group Rhythm — just a flat sorted block

expectations.text: With-skill agent recognizes that .c-glass-card engine owns background/border-radius/transition and avoids duplicating those
expectations.evidence: No awareness of engine classes — background: white, border-radius: 8px, transition kept in component file
